📐 PYTHAGOREAN GEOMETRY · c² = a² + b²
Side A (Team A score)
Side B (Team B score)
Hypotenuse C = √(A²+B²)
Pace multiplier (period)
Projected final = C × multiplier
Delta (projected − O/U line)
Zone angle θ = arctan(B/A)
